name: IdsEdwMbrMcareEvtDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_SK,COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') SRC_SYS_CD,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK,MBR_MCARE_EVT.EFF_DT_SK,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_SK,MBR_MCARE_EVT.TERM_DT_SK,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SRC_SYS_CRT_DT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_EFF_DT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_TERM_DT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_RESDNC_ST_NM,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_RESDNC_CNTY_NM,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_MCARE_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.BILL_GRP_UNIQ_KEY,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MCARE_CNTR_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_A_RISK_ADJ_FCTR,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_B_RISK_ADJ_FCTR,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SGNTR_DT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.MCARE_ELECTN_TYP_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PLN_BNF_PCKG_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEG_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_RISK_ADJ_FCTR,MBR_MCARE_EVT.RISK_ADJ_FCTR_TYP_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PRM_WTHLD_OPT_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_C_PRM_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_PRM_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PRIOR_COM_OVRD_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.ENR_SRC_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.UNCOV_MO_CT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_GRP_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_RX_BIN_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_RX_PCN_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEC_DRUG_INSUR_IN,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEC_DRUG_INSUR_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEC_DRUG_INSUR_GRP_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEC_DRUG_INSUR_BIN_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.SEC_DRUG_INSUR_PCN_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_SBSDY_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.COPAY_CAT_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_LOW_INCM_PRM_SBSDY_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_WAIVED_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_SBSDY_AMT,MBR_MCARE_EVT.AGED_DSBLD_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_STTUS_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.PART_D_RISK_ADJ_FCTR_TYP_ID,MBR_MCARE_EVT.IC_MDL_IN,MBR_MCARE_EVT.IC_MDL_BNF_STTUS_TX,MBR_MCARE_EVT.IC_MDL_END_DT_RSN_TX,COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD,COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MCARE_EVT MBR_MCARE_EVT INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_MBR_DRVR DRVR ON MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY=DRVR.KEY_VAL_INT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON MBR_MCARE_EVT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON MBR_MCARE_EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK=CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE DRVR.SUBJ_NM='MBR_UNIQ_KEY'), cte_transform AS (SELECT MBR_MCARE_EVT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD))='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD END MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD, EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_EFF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MBR_SK, TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM))='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM END MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK, CONVERT(date,SRC_SYS_CRT_DT) AS SRC_SYS_CRT_DT, CONVERT(date,MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_EFF_DT) AS MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_EFF_DT, CONVERT(date,MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_TERM_DT) AS MCARE_EVT_ADTNL_TERM_DT, MBR_RESDNC_ST_NM, MBR_RESDNC_CNTY_NM, MBR_MCARE_ID, BILL_GRP_UNIQ_KEY, MCARE_CNTR_ID, PART_A_RISK_ADJ_FCTR, PART_B_RISK_ADJ_FCTR, CONVERT(date,SGNTR_DT) AS SGNTR_DT, MCARE_ELECTN_TYP_ID, PLN_BNF_PCKG_ID, SEG_ID, PART_D_RISK_ADJ_FCTR, RISK_ADJ_FCTR_TYP_ID, PRM_WTHLD_OPT_ID, PART_C_PRM_AMT, PART_D_PRM_AMT, PRIOR_COM_OVRD_ID, ENR_SRC_ID, UNCOV_MO_CT, PART_D_ID, PART_D_GRP_ID, PART_D_RX_BIN_ID, PART_D_RX_PCN_ID, SEC_DRUG_INSUR_IN, SEC_DRUG_INSUR_ID, SEC_DRUG_INSUR_GRP_ID, SEC_DRUG_INSUR_BIN_ID, SEC_DRUG_INSUR_PCN_ID, PART_D_SBSDY_ID, COPAY_CAT_ID, PART_D_LOW_INCM_PRM_SBSDY_AMT, PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_AMT, PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_WAIVED_AMT, PART_D_LATE_ENR_PNLTY_SBSDY_AMT, AGED_DSBLD_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_STTUS_ID, PART_D_RISK_ADJ_FCTR_TYP_ID, IC_MDL_IN, IC_MDL_BNF_STTUS_TX, IC_MDL_END_DT_RSN_TX FROM cte_main) SELECT * FROM cte_transform

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     
	   EdwMbrMcareEvtExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
	   Pulls data from IDS and codes hash file to load into the EDW

Calling job Name: EdwMbrExtrLoadDriverSeq

INPUTS:
	   IDS:   MBR_MCARE_EVT
  
HASH FILES:
                   hf_cdma_codes - Load the CDMA codes to get cd and cd_nm from cd_sk

TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes

OUTPUTS: 
                  Sequential file for database loading

MODIFICATIONS:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                DATASTAGE               CODE                          				 DATE
DEVELOPER             DATE                PROJECT                     DESCRIPTION                                                                                      ENVIRONMENT                        		REVIEWER                 REVIEW
-----------------------------    ----------------------     ------------------------------        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  ------------------------------    ------------------------------       --------------------
 Sharon Andrew        03/01/2006 -                                            Originally Program
 Suzanne Saylor        04/12/2006 -                                            Changed > #BeginCycle# to >=, added RunCycle parameter, set LAST_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK to RunCycle
 Sharon Andrew        07/06/2006  -                                           Renamed from EdwMbrMcareEvtExtr to IdsMbrMcareEvtExtr.  
                                                                                                   Added driver table processing for extractions
Pooja Sunkara          06/24/2013                                              Converted job from server to parallel version. Renamed CurrentDate to EDWRunCycleDate and  Renamed job to IdsEdwMbrMcareEvtExtr

Mohan Karnati         05/07/2020       US#214129                     Adding new columns from 8th row in source stage till the end                    EnterpriseDev2	          Jaideep Mankala              05/27/2020

Annotations:
Extract is dependent on table MBR_DRVR
Add CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK and LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK
Getting Reference data TRGT_CD and 
TRGT_CD_NM
Job name:
IdsEdwMbrMcareEvtExtr
Member Medicare Event Extract - Pulls from IDS MBR_EVT to load to EDW MBR_EVT_D
Write MBR_MCARE_EVT_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK
CD_MPPNG_SK
Read data from source table MBR_MCARE_EVT. Pull SRC_SYS_CD column from CD_MPPNG_SK table by joining tables MBR_MCARE_EVT and CD_MPPNG_SK and on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK.
